hero.title: Hire the right people, with AI by your side
hero.subtitle: ARISP automates your entire IT recruitment process — from job posting, CV screening, multi-round AI interviews to evaluation — so HR can focus on the final decision.

features.title: Everything HR needs, in one platform
features.subtitle: No more juggling dozens of tools — ARISP consolidates your entire recruitment workflow.

jobBoard.title: Internal IT Job Board
jobBoard.desc: Candidates search and apply directly on your platform — no third-party intermediaries.

aiInterview.title: Multi-round AI Interviews
aiInterview.desc: Screening, technical, case-based — AI handles every round with consistent evaluation quality.

autoEvaluate.title: Automated Evaluation
autoEvaluate.desc: Pass/Not Pass reports with detailed per-criteria analysis — HR just needs to confirm.

playbook.title: Company Playbook
playbook.desc: Integrate internal interview documents into RAG — questions always align with company standards.

multiLang.title: Multi-language
multiLang.desc: Automatically detects language from JD — interview in Vietnamese, English, and more.

codeOnsite.title: On-site Interview Codes
codeOnsite.desc: Candidates arrive on-site, enter a 6-character code to start — fast, secure, no installation.

demo.title: Experience AI Interview in Minutes
demo.subtitle: See how AI interviews and evaluates candidates — no registration required.

cta.title: Ready to revolutionize your recruitment?
cta.subtitle: Explore ARISP and discover how AI helps your HR team focus on what matters most — people.

trust.title: Trusted by Modern HR Teams
trust.subtitle: 5000+ candidates have been interviewed by ARISP
